examples: The lioness is still nursing her cubs.
Not a house cat, not a mouser in a barn in some green forest town, but a lioness or a jungle panther.
The buffalo started snorting and walking with the lioness on its back trying to escape.
In 2002, a lioness at Samburu National Park adopted a succession of baby oryx.
Trying not to breathe, I turned my head and saw the moonlit shadow of a lioness.
